activation_dependency_binding.controlling_source_fact: Calibration packet CAL-ACR-022 explicitly covers DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P for release condition RC-7, completed before activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022. The shared DG-41B prefix is not relied upon alone; the calibration record provides explicit production-unit specificity matching the activation request. Site roster SITE-ACR-022 confirms DG-41B production telemetry units exist at Site 18-P. Release condition RC-7 requires calibration attachment before activation, which is satisfied. Timing prerequisite is met per calibration completion record.

blocked_inferences: Inference that shared DG-41B naming prefix between lab and production units creates device-group ambiguity
Inference that calibration evidence does not exactly match activation device group
Inference that administrative close-out completion alone satisfies the activation dependency
Inference that NOTE-ACR-022 disqualifies the calibration despite explicit production-unit specificity in CAL-ACR-022

worker_disagreement_ledger.reason: Cited CAL-ACR-022 and STD-ACR-022-P but did not recognize that CAL-ACR-022 explicitly specifies DG-41B production units, removing ambiguity from the shared prefix note. The calibration record provides exact-match evidence on device group, site, release condition, and timing.

Acknowledged CAL-ACR-022 explicitly covers DG-41B production units at Site 18-P for RC-7 with calibration completing before activation, yet applied NOTE-ACR-022 to create ambiguity the calibration record itself resolves. The calibration evidence explicitly states production-unit coverage, not merely a shared prefix.

Stated device groups do not exactly match but cited both ACT-ACR-022 and CAL-ACR-022 which both reference DG-41B production units. The calibration record explicitly identifies production units at Site 18-P, satisfying the exact-match requirement without reliance on prefix alone.

Applied NOTE-ACR-022 shared-prefix warning against calibration evidence that explicitly specifies production units, site, release condition, and timing. The calibration record provides concrete specificity beyond the prefix, closing the dependency per STD-ACR-022-P.

cited_evidence: ACT-ACR-022: Service activation request activates DG-41B production units at Site 18-P under RC-7
CAL-ACR-022: Calibration explicitly covers DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P for RC-7, completed before activation
ALERT-ACR-DEP-022: Dependency exception alert requiring exact match of device group, site, release condition, and timing
RC-ACR-022: Release condition RC-7 requires calibration packet attachment before service activation
SITE-ACR-022: Site roster confirms DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P
STD-ACR-022-P: Policy requiring exact match of device group, site, release condition, and timing; shared naming prefixes alone are insufficient
LOG-ACR-022: Activation review log records dependency attachment and scheduled activation time
NOTE-ACR-022: Reference note flagging shared DG-41B prefix between lab and production devices

activation_dependency_binding.controlling_source_fact: Calibration CAL-ACR-022 covers lab units at Site 18-L; activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 targets production units at Site 18-P. Shared DG-41B prefix is explicitly insufficient per STD-ACR-022-P policy.

blocked_inferences: The DG-41B prefix alone does not establish calibration validity for production activation
Lab unit calibration cannot be extrapolated to production unit readiness
Administrative close-out completion does not resolve the calibration mismatch

worker_disagreement_ledger.reason: Correctly identified device group mismatch between calibration evidence and activation target
Properly noted site and operational context divergence despite shared device group prefix
Accurately distinguished lab versus production site context as disqualifying factor
Correctly applied STD-ACR-022-P exact match requirement across device group, site, and context

cited_evidence: ACT-ACR-2026-8022 (service activation request for DG-41B production units at Site 18-P)
CAL-ACR-022 (calibration covering DG-41B lab units at Site 18-L)
STD-ACR-022-P (activation dependency review standard: shared prefixes not sufficient)
ALERT-ACR-DEP-022 (dependency exception alert requiring exact match)
RC-ACR-022 (release condition RC-7 requiring calibration attachment)
open_blockers: No calibration record covers DG-41B production units at Site 18-P for release condition RC-7
Lab unit calibration (CAL-ACR-022) does not establish production unit readiness
Calibration site mismatch: Site 18-L vs Site 18-P
Operational context mismatch: lab units vs production units
